header.label: Stage 6 FINAL — close-out (6.7 soak + 6.9 archive + 6.10 final STATUS)

scope.summary:
Phase 8 is the final Stage 6 dispatch. It formalizes the 24-hour soak verdict (item 6.7), archives the platform_separation/ directory (item 6.9), records the final STATUS.md "Migration Complete" entry (item 6.10), and explicitly logs deferral status for the remaining items (6.1, 6.2, 6.3, 6.6, 6.8).
After Phase 8 merges: - Stage 6 is declared CLOSED. - docs/platform_separation/ becomes docs/archive/platform_separation/. - Platform Separation v2 procedure is COMPLETE.
Three execution sub-items + four deferral records:
(6.7) 24-hour soak verdict — formalize PASS based on empirical fleet runtime since Stage 4 cutover (2026-04-28). Fleet has been running on devplatform for 10+ days at the time of this dispatch — vastly exceeds the 24h soak bar. EA-17 captures current fleet health metrics as the formal soak record.
(6.9) Archive docs/platform_separation/ — git mv to docs/archive/platform_separation/ in BlarAI. Use git mv (not Move-Item) to preserve file history. The temp_for_responses/ subdirectory (containing this dispatch + EA-1..EA-17 close reports + dispatches + 4 frozen verdict files) is included in the move.
(6.10) Final STATUS.md "Migration Complete" entry — append E16 to STATUS.md BEFORE the archive move. Entry summarizes: Stage 6 closed, deferrals listed, final backlog, post-archive paths.
(6.1, 6.2, 6.3 deferral) Doctrine splits (CLAUDE.md / .github/copilot-instructions.md / AGENTS.md) — DEFERRED per LA decision in v2 6.1.v2 + LA 2026-05-08 confirmation. Recorded in STATUS.md E16 as explicit deferral, not silent drop. Revisit in dedicated session at LA's discretion.
(6.6 deferral) Doctrine-split commits — DEFERRED (depends on 6.1-6.3).
(6.8 deferral) Optional fleet hand-off — RESOLVED IMPLICITLY by Stage 6.7.5 hardening practice. Across 6.7.5 Phases 1-7, the fleet (via EA Code) actively maintained devplatform; no separate kickoff ticket needed. Recorded in STATUS.md E16.
IMPORTANT — complete_task remains RESTORED: Phase 6 fix (devplatform commit ea2fbf5) is merged; user has restarted Claude Code since (verified live in Phase 7 EA-16). Phase 7 used mcp__vikunja__complete_task directly with no MCP-403-P5 incident. EA-17 verifies via Check 0f before first call.
scope.acceptance: 1. 6.7 soak verdict captured with current fleet metrics (Get-ScheduledTask LastTaskResult, Vikunja DB size, bridge daemon liveness check). 2. STATUS.md E16 entry appended at docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md BEFORE the archive move. Entry records: Stage 6 closed, 6.7 PASS, 6.9 + 6.10 done, deferrals (6.1/6.2/6.3/6.6/6.8), final backlog 45 / 30 / 15. 3. docs/platform_separation/ archived via `git mv` to docs/archive/platform_separation/. File history preserved. 4. Phase 8 tracking task created in Vikunja Project 10 with title prefix "Stage 6 FINAL Phase 8 tracking". 5. Phase 8 tracking task closed (done=True) at PF1 PASS via mcp__vikunja__complete_task. 6. Stage 6 closure recorded in unpause commit message.

background.item:
Stage 6 (per docs/platform_separation/07_STAGE6_HARDENING.xml) consists of items 6.1 through 6.10 plus the meta-initiative 6.7.5 (which expanded into the 7-phase hardening sprint just closed at E15).
Status as of 2026-05-08: 6.1 — Split CLAUDE.md DEFERRED (LA decision in v2 6.1.v2) 6.2 — Split .github/copilot-instructions.md DEFERRED (LA decision in v2 6.1.v2) 6.3 — Split AGENTS.md DEFERRED (LA decision in v2 6.1.v2) 6.4 — Update devplatform pyproject.toml DONE (Stage 6.7.5 Phase 2, E10) 6.5 — Migrate remaining platform-layer docs DONE (Stage 6.7.5 Phase 2, E10) 6.6 — Commit doctrine splits DEFERRED (depends on 6.1-6.3) 6.7 — 24-hour soak observation PENDING (Phase 8 — formalize verdict) 6.7.5 — Auto-create hardening tickets DONE (entire 6.7.5 hardening, E8-E15) 6.8 — Optional fleet hand-off RESOLVED IMPLICITLY (record in E16) 6.9 — Archive docs/platform_separation/ PENDING (Phase 8) 6.10 — Final STATUS.md "Migration Complete" PENDING (Phase 8)

The Stage 6 XML §6.7 prescribes a 24-hour soak observation: scheduled task last-run results, Vikunja DB growth, bridge daemon liveness, no unexpected BlarAI directory access. As of 2026-05-08, the fleet has been running on devplatform since the Stage 4 cutover (2026-04-28) — 10+ days continuous operation, including 7 Stage 6.7.5 hardening phases that exercised the fleet under realistic load (EA wakes, gate runners, scheduled reports, escalations, rotations). The empirical soak window vastly exceeds the 24h bar.
EA-17 captures current fleet metrics (Check 0g) as the formal soak record. Verdict criteria for PASS: - All 13 scheduled tasks at TaskPath '\BlarAI\' have LastTaskResult == 0 (success) - Bridge daemon process is running OR has a documented absence reason - Vikunja DB size shows non-zero growth from baseline (live activity) No-unexpected-BlarAI-access is an architectural property already validated by Stage 6.7.5 Tickets II + JJ + VV (cross-repo path work). Confirmed in Phase 5 close report.

The Stage 6 XML §6.9 prescribes Move-Item; we substitute `git mv` to preserve file history (Move-Item then commit-add-as-new would lose blame). The move target is:
BEFORE: C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\platform_separation\ AFTER: C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\archive\platform_separation\
The platform_separation/ directory contains: - 00_MASTER_PLAN.md, INFRA_DELTA_v2.md, STATUS.md, RECOVERY.md, ROLLBACK_NOVICE_GUIDE.md, VERIFICATION_COMMANDS.md, AUDIT_RISK_REVIEW.md - 01_STAGE0_PREFLIGHT.xml … 07_STAGE6_HARDENING.xml - temp_for_responses/ — all EA dispatches, close reports, frozen verdict files (4 of them named in Constraint C-NOEDIT), and this dispatch itself
docs/archive/ does not yet exist. The git mv command will create it as a side-effect (or EA-17 creates it explicitly via mkdir before mv).
External references to the old path that may need updating: - BlarAI/CLAUDE.md (no direct refs to docs/platform_separation/ found in current head) - BlarAI/.github/copilot-instructions.md (no direct refs found in current head) - devplatform/docs/PLATFORM_SEPARATION_HISTORY.md — explicitly references BlarAI/docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md as the canonical pointer - BlarAI/docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md cross-references inside itself (these stay coherent because the file moves WITH its references)
EA-17 must update devplatform/docs/PLATFORM_SEPARATION_HISTORY.md to reference the new archive path. This is the ONLY external pointer that breaks if not updated.

STATUS.md E15 (the entry from Phase 7) is currently at the bottom of the file. E16 (this phase's entry) is appended after E15. The STATUS.md edit MUST happen BEFORE the git mv so that the final state of the file (with E16) is what gets archived.
E16 content outline: - Title: "Stage 6 FINAL — Platform Separation v2 COMPLETE" - Phase 8 commits referenced (pause SHA, STATUS.md SHA, archive-move SHA, unpause SHA) - 6.7 soak verdict: PASS — empirical 10-day soak; fleet metrics from Check 0g table - 6.9: docs/platform_separation/ archived to docs/archive/platform_separation/ via git mv - 6.10: this entry IS 6.10 - Deferrals: 6.1 + 6.2 + 6.3 (doctrine splits) + 6.6 (commit) DEFERRED per v2 6.1.v2 + LA 2026-05-08 confirmation; 6.8 RESOLVED IMPLICITLY by Stage 6.7.5 fleet activity - Final backlog: 45 total / 30 done / 15 open - Post-archive path: docs/archive/platform_separation/ (BlarAI side); platform-side history breadcrumb at devplatform/docs/PLATFORM_SEPARATION_HISTORY.md - Stage 6 declared CLOSED. Platform Separation v2 procedure declared COMPLETE.

comprehension_gate.instruction: Respond with a comprehension gate covering CG1-CG6 exactly. Stop after the gate. Wait for Guide APPROVED before any pre-flight or edit.

items.item: List the 3 execution sub-items (6.7 soak verdict, 6.9 archive, 6.10 final STATUS) with their primary file or action. List the 4 deferral records (6.1, 6.2, 6.3, 6.6, 6.8) and their disposition. State what "Stage 6 FINAL" means after Phase 8 merges.
For 6.7 soak verdict: what is the empirical context (cutover date + days elapsed)? What 3 metrics does Check 0g capture? What are the PASS criteria?

For 6.9 archive: state the source path, target path, and the tool to use (git mv vs Move-Item) and why. Name the one external reference that MUST be updated to point at the new archive path. What happens to the 4 frozen verdict files inside temp_for_responses/ during the move?
For 6.10 STATUS.md E16: WHEN does it get appended (before or after the archive move)? Why does the order matter? List the 7 elements that E16 must contain.

State the commit plan: branch (or main directly), commit sequence, repo for each. Backlog math: Phase 7 close → Phase 8 delta → final. Vikunja: how is the Phase 8 tracking task closed (which MCP tool)?

Confirm all 8 binding acks (g10-ea17_n1 through n8) are understood. For n3: name the 4 frozen verdict files (post-archive paths). For n5: confirm git mv is the archive tool (not Move-Item or cp+rm). For n7: confirm STATUS.md E16 is committed BEFORE the archive move commit.

preflight.check: Read C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\tools\autonomy_budget\state.json. Confirm fleet_paused=false at session start. If fleet_paused=true: HARD STOP.

BlarAI: git -C "C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI" tag --list EXPECT: pre-platform-extract AND post-platform-extract present. devplatform: git -C "C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform" tag --list EXPECT: platform-extracted present. If any required tag absent: HARD STOP.

check.label: Confirm docs/archive/ does NOT yet exist (Item 6.9 baseline)

preflight.check: Run: python -c "from pathlib import Path; p = Path(r'C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\archive'); print('archive exists:', p.exists())" EXPECT: archive exists: False If True: docs/archive/ already exists — verify it does not contain a platform_separation subdirectory. If it does: HARD STOP and report.

check.label: Confirm complete_task MCP tool RESTORED (still — same as Phase 7)

preflight.check: Run: python -c " import inspect, sys sys.path.insert(0, r'C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform') from tools.vikunja_mcp import server src = inspect.getsource(server.complete_task) has_get = '_api_get' in src has_desc = 'description' in src print('complete_task has _api_get:', has_get) print('complete_task has description:', has_desc) print('RESTORED:', has_get and has_desc) " EXPECT: RESTORED: True If False: fall back to Option B (get_task → update_task(done=True, all fields) → add_comment) for the Phase 8 tracking task close. Document in close report.

Capture the formal soak record:
(a) Scheduled task last-run results — all 13 BlarAI tasks: powershell -Command "Get-ScheduledTask -TaskPath '\BlarAI\' | Get-ScheduledTaskInfo | Select-Object TaskName, LastRunTime, LastTaskResult | Format-Table -AutoSize" EXPECT: 13 rows; LastTaskResult == 0 for all rows. If any non-zero: capture which task and the result code; note in close report. Verdict criterion: 0 non-zero LastTaskResult values for soak PASS (allow up to 1 documented exception with rationale).
(b) Vikunja DB size: powershell -Command "(Get-Item C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\tools\vikunja\vikunja.db).Length" EXPECT: integer > 100000 (any non-trivially-empty DB confirms live activity).
(c) Bridge daemon liveness: powershell -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \"Name = 'python.exe'\" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'tools\\.vikunja_mcp\\.bridge' } | Select-Object ProcessId, @{N='CommandLineSnippet';E={$_.CommandLine.Substring(0, [Math]::Min($_.CommandLine.Length, 120))}} | Format-Table -AutoSize" EXPECT: 1+ row showing a python.exe process running tools.vikunja_mcp.bridge. If 0 rows: not a HARD STOP — bridge is optional infrastructure for Cowork/Codex sandboxes; document absence with rationale in close report.
Capture all 3 outputs verbatim into the close report §3.6.7.
preflight.fleet_pause:
Pause the fleet using the Python helper: python -c "from tools.autonomy_budget import state; state.pause_fleet('Stage 6 FINAL close-out (Phase 8): soak verdict + archive + final STATUS', updated_by='ea_code', path='C:/Users/mrbla/devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json')"
Commit immediately in devplatform on main: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform add tools/autonomy_budget/state.json git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform commit -m "chore(ops): pause fleet -- Stage 6 FINAL close-out"
preflight.tracking_task: Create Phase 8 tracking task in Vikunja Project 10: Title: "Stage 6 FINAL Phase 8 tracking: close-out (6.7 soak + 6.9 archive + 6.10 final STATUS)" Priority: 2 Labels: Active (id 1), Documentation (id 7), Architecture (id 4) Add starting comment: "[agent:ea_code][phase:start] Phase 8 = Stage 6 FINAL execution. Scope: 6.7 soak verdict + 6.9 archive + 6.10 final STATUS + deferral records (6.1/6.2/6.3/6.6/6.8). Pre-flight checks passed. complete_task: per Check 0f." Record tracking task ID for PF1 bifurcation.

task.label: 6.7 soak verdict — already captured in Check 0g

execution.task: No file edits. The soak verdict is recorded in the close report §3.6.7 from Check 0g output. The STATUS.md E16 entry will reference this with a verdict summary (PASS / partial / FAIL based on Check 0g result).

edit.instruction:
Append evolution entry E16 immediately after E15. Required content (one paragraph, following the prose-density pattern of E10-E15):
E16: "Stage 6 FINAL — Platform Separation v2 COMPLETE (BlarAI commits: STATUS.md E16 commit (this commit) + archive-move commit (next commit; recover via `git log --oneline -- docs/archive/platform_separation/`). devplatform commits: pause `` + unpause ``. 2026-05-08). **Item 6.7 (24h soak observation)**: PASS — empirical soak window 2026-04-28 (Stage 4 cutover) → 2026-05-08 (this entry) = 10 days continuous fleet operation including 7 Stage 6.7.5 hardening phases. Check 0g metrics (devplatform side): of 13 scheduled tasks at TaskPath '\BlarAI\' returned LastTaskResult=0; Vikunja DB size bytes; bridge daemon . **Item 6.9 (archive)**: docs/platform_separation/ moved to docs/archive/platform_separation/ via git mv (preserves file history). All contents migrated including the 4 frozen Stage 3 verdict files (3.0.v2 / 3.1.v2 / 3.2.v2 / 3.10) and EA-1..EA-17 dispatches and close reports. **Item 6.10 (final entry)**: this entry. **Deferrals**: Items 6.1, 6.2, 6.3 (split CLAUDE.md / .github/copilot-instructions.md / AGENTS.md between BlarAI and devplatform) and 6.6 (commit doctrine splits) DEFERRED per v2 6.1.v2 'SOP work has already been done; defer split until separate session' + LA 2026-05-08 confirmation. Item 6.8 (optional fleet hand-off) RESOLVED IMPLICITLY: Stage 6.7.5 Phases 1-7 saw 16 EA-Code instances actively maintain devplatform (commits ae75507, 763a983, ea2fbf5, bc0be3d, 13145c3, 681a905, bebd6e2, 3802805, 83cda41, 77c99af, bdb7361, bc2ce64, 34baf0f, plus all earlier Phase 1-4 work) — the bootstrap-paradox exit was effectuated by routine practice; no separate kickoff ticket required. **Backlog**: 45 total / 30 done / 15 open after Phase 8 tracking task close (was 44/29/15 at boot; net +1 total via tracking task # / +1 done via tracking task close / 0 open change). **Stage 6 declared CLOSED. Platform Separation v2 procedure declared COMPLETE.** Post-archive paths: BlarAI-side history at C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\archive\platform_separation\ (this STATUS.md is included in that archive); platform-side breadcrumb at C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform\docs\PLATFORM_SEPARATION_HISTORY.md (created Phase 7, contains pointer + 7 architectural decisions). **Anomalies bound this phase**: none new. **15 deferred Stage 6.7.5 tickets**: remain in Vikunja Project 10 'DevPlatform-Meta' as the post-operational backlog; not closed by Stage 6 close (per ack g10-ea16_n7); will be addressed in future sprints at LA's discretion."
EA-17 fills the placeholder values (PAUSE_SHA, UNPAUSE_SHA, soak metric counts, TRACKING_ID) at write time from Check 0g output and commit SHAs.
Update the closing line of STATUS.md (currently "**Cumulative-ack chain at evolution snapshot**: 132 binding atoms ... evolution items E1-E15 are doctrine-internal state changes ...") to read "...evolution items E1-E16 are doctrine-internal state changes...".
Commit on BlarAI main: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI add docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md git -C C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI commit -m "docs(stage6_final): Stage 6 FINAL -- Platform Separation v2 COMPLETE (E16)"

task.label: git mv docs/platform_separation -> docs/archive/platform_separation
task.instruction:
Use git mv (NOT Move-Item) to preserve file history.
Sequence (BlarAI repo): # Create parent directory (git tracks files, not dirs; this is just a placeholder # location; git mv will create the leaf platform_separation directory automatically). # If docs/archive/ does not exist, mkdir it first (no commit needed for empty dir): New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\archive -Force
# Then git mv the entire platform_separation directory: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI mv docs/platform_separation docs/archive/platform_separation
# Stage and commit (the move commits as a series of file renames): git -C C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI status # verify all files show as renames git -C C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI commit -m "docs(stage6_final): archive docs/platform_separation -> docs/archive/platform_separation (Item 6.9)"
VERIFY: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI log --oneline -1 --follow -- docs/archive/platform_separation/STATUS.md # Should show this commit + all prior STATUS.md history.
IMPORTANT: Frozen verdict files (3.0.v2, 3.1.v2, 3.2.v2, 3.10) are inside docs/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/ — they get moved as part of this rename. Their CONTENTS are NOT modified (no-amend doctrine preserved); only their PATHS change. Constraint C-NOEDIT remains satisfied.

edit.instruction:
The history doc references BlarAI/docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md as the canonical pointer (created in Phase 7). After the archive move, that path is broken. Update the path in PLATFORM_SEPARATION_HISTORY.md.
Find the existing pointer (likely line ~9 or in the Summary section): OLD: BlarAI/docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md NEW: BlarAI/docs/archive/platform_separation/STATUS.md
If the doc references E8-E15 as "see STATUS.md entries", that reference still works because all entries archived together.
This is a single trivial path edit. Commit on devplatform main: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform add docs/PLATFORM_SEPARATION_HISTORY.md git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform commit -m "docs(stage6_final): update PLATFORM_SEPARATION_HISTORY.md pointer to archive path"

execution.vikunja_closes:
Use mcp__vikunja__complete_task if Check 0f confirmed RESTORED. Fall back to Option B if Check 0f failed.
Phase 8 tracking task: close with completion comment. Comment template: "[agent:ea_code][phase:completion] Phase 8 complete. Stage 6 FINAL closed. Platform Separation v2 COMPLETE. - 6.7 soak verdict: ; Check 0g metrics in close report §3.6.7. - 6.9 archive: docs/platform_separation/ -> docs/archive/platform_separation/ via git mv. BlarAI commit . - 6.10 final STATUS: E16 appended; BlarAI commit . - Deferrals recorded: 6.1/6.2/6.3/6.6 + 6.8. - devplatform PLATFORM_SEPARATION_HISTORY.md pointer updated; commit . Backlog: 45/30/15."
DO NOT close any of the 15 deferred Stage 6.7.5 tickets (Constraint C-DEFER-PRESERVE).
execution.fleet_unpause:
python -c "from tools.autonomy_budget import state; state.resume_fleet(updated_by='ea_code', path='C:/Users/mrbla/devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json')"
git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform add tools/autonomy_budget/state.json git -C C:\Users\mrbla\devplatform commit -m "chore(ops): unpause fleet -- Stage 6 FINAL complete; Platform Separation v2 COMPLETE"
execution.pf1_bifurcation: PASS path: close Phase 8 tracking task via complete_task (or Option B). HARD STOP path: comment on tracking task with failure summary; leave done=false. Per AOAM §4.

ea_dispatch.close_report_format:
Write close report to: C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\docs\platform_separation\temp_for_responses\6.X-EA_INSTANCE_17_STAGE6_FINAL_CLOSE_REPORT.md
NOTE: write the close report BEFORE the archive move so it can use the pre-archive path. The close report itself will then be archived along with everything else (the close report becomes part of the archived audit trail).
Report must cover: 1. Phase 8 PASS / HARD STOP verdict 2. Pre-flight results (0a/0b/0c/0f/0g) 3. Each work item result: 3.6.7 — soak verdict with full Check 0g output (3 metric blocks) 3.6.9 — archive move: pre-move file count, git mv command output, post-move file count + spot-check on a frozen verdict file's path 3.6.10 — STATUS.md E16 text (verbatim what was appended) 3.deferrals — explicit deferral records for 6.1, 6.2, 6.3, 6.6, 6.8 (one line each) 3.history — devplatform PLATFORM_SEPARATION_HISTORY.md pointer update diff 4. Commit SHAs: devplatform: pause SHA, unpause SHA, history-update SHA BlarAI: STATUS.md E16 SHA, archive-move SHA 5. Vikunja: Phase 8 tracking task done=True; tool used (complete_task or Option B) 6. Stage 6 closure statement: "Stage 6 declared CLOSED. Platform Separation v2 procedure declared COMPLETE." 7. Backlog: 45 / 30 / 15 (final); 15 deferred tickets remain in Project 10 as post-operational backlog 8. Acks discharged: all 8 g10-ea17_n* acks
Post short summary (5-10 lines) to chat.

constraints.constraint: Four frozen verdict files must NOT be edited. Their PATHS change as part of Item 6.9 (archive move via git mv preserves history without modifying contents). After Phase 8 they will live at: docs/archive/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.0.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_STAGE3_COMPREHENSIVE_AUDIT_CHECKPOINT.xml docs/archive/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.1.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_ITEM_3_1_V2_VERIFIED_SPEC_CORRECTION_AUTHORIZED.xml docs/archive/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.2.v2-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_ITEM_3_2_V2_RECLASSIFICATION_REQUIRED_SELECTIVE_COPY_AUTHORIZED.xml docs/archive/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/3.10-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_7_STAGE3_CLOSE_VERIFIED.xml Their content remains unchanged. Verify post-move via: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI show HEAD --stat | findstr 3.0.v2 3.1.v2 3.2.v2 3.10 Should show only `R` (rename) entries, never `M` (modify).

All git add commands name files explicitly. Never git add . or git add -A. EXCEPTION: `git mv ` is allowed and is the prescribed tool for Item 6.9 (it stages the rename automatically; no separate `git add` needed for the moved files). Use of `git mv` does NOT violate explicit-add discipline because the move target is named explicitly in the command.

Phase 8 closes ONLY the Phase 8 tracking task in Vikunja. The 15 currently-open Stage 6.7.5 tickets in Project 10 (UU 316, GG 297, HH 298, LL 302, MM 303, PP 305, QQ 306, RR 307, SS 308, TT 309, B 310, C 311, D 312, E 313, F 314) MUST remain open. They are the post-operational backlog and live beyond Stage 6 closure. Do not modify, label-change, or close them.

Strict ordering required: (1) Pre-flight (Checks 0a/0b/0c/0f/0g) + fleet pause + tracking task creation. (2) Append STATUS.md E16 + commit on BlarAI main. (3) Write close report to temp_for_responses/. (4) git mv docs/platform_separation -> docs/archive/platform_separation + commit on BlarAI main. (5) Edit + commit devplatform/docs/PLATFORM_SEPARATION_HISTORY.md. (6) Close Phase 8 tracking task in Vikunja (complete_task or Option B). (7) Unpause fleet + commit on devplatform main.
Steps (2) and (3) MUST precede step (4) — once the move happens, the source paths cease to exist and the close report path argument would resolve to the archived location (which is fine — the close report is archived too — but the EA must have written to the pre-move path).

The git mv must move the ENTIRE platform_separation directory tree. Verify post-move: git -C C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI ls-files docs/platform_separation/ Should return EMPTY (zero rows). git -C C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI ls-files docs/archive/platform_separation/ | Measure-Object -Line Should show a row count >= the pre-move count.
If any files remain at the old path: HARD STOP — investigate and report.

exclusions.item: Items 6.1, 6.2, 6.3 (doctrine splits) — DEFERRED, recorded in STATUS.md E16. Do not edit CLAUDE.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md, or AGENTS.md in either repo.
Item 6.8 (optional fleet hand-off ticket) — RESOLVED IMPLICITLY; do not create the kickoff ticket. Recorded in STATUS.md E16.
The 15 open Stage 6.7.5 tickets in Project 10 — do not close. Post-operational backlog (Constraint C-DEFER-PRESERVE).
Any code changes in either repo — Phase 8 is documentation + archive only. The only non-doc edits are state.json (fleet pause/unpause).

acknowledgements.ack: Fleet-pause SOP: state.pause_fleet(...) + commit BEFORE any BlarAI multi-commit work; state.resume_fleet(...) (NOT unpause_fleet — wrong name) + commit as LAST action. Unpause commit message records the closure milestone: "chore(ops): unpause fleet -- Stage 6 FINAL complete; Platform Separation v2 COMPLETE".

Explicit-add discipline: every git add names files explicitly. Never git add . or -A. EXCEPTION: `git mv` for Item 6.9 stages renames automatically — this is allowed and named explicitly in the mv source/target arguments.

No-amend doctrine: 4 frozen verdict files (3.0.v2, 3.1.v2, 3.2.v2, 3.10) MUST NOT be modified. Their paths change via git mv (preserves history); their contents are preserved verbatim. Verify post-move with `git show HEAD --stat` showing R (rename) entries only, no M (modify).

complete_task RESTORED: Phase 6 fix is merged; Phase 7 verified live use. EA-17 verifies via Check 0f before first MCP call. PASS → use mcp__vikunja__complete_task directly. FAIL → fall back to Option B (get_task → update_task(done=True, fields) → add_task_comment).
Archive uses git mv (NOT Move-Item, NOT cp+rm). git mv preserves file history through the rename — `git log --follow` on the new path shows pre-move history. Move-Item would lose that linkage.

Deferral records: items 6.1, 6.2, 6.3 (doctrine splits) and 6.6 (commit) are EXPLICITLY DEFERRED, not silently dropped. Recorded in STATUS.md E16 with rationale (v2 6.1.v2 original deferral + LA 2026-05-08 confirmation). Item 6.8 is RESOLVED IMPLICITLY (Stage 6.7.5 fleet practice effectuated the hand-off); also explicitly recorded. Future Stage 6.x revival ticket (if LA later wants the splits) gets a fresh ack chain.

Strict ordering (per Constraint C-ORDER): STATUS.md E16 commit MUST precede the git mv archive commit. Reasoning: STATUS.md content reflects the pre-archive state of the doc; archiving without the E16 entry would leave a permanent record claiming Stage 6 is closed in a STATUS.md that doesn't say so. Close report is also written before the archive move (it's archived along with platform_separation/).

Stage 6 closure milestone: recorded in the unpause commit message and in STATUS.md E16. Final phrasing: "Stage 6 declared CLOSED. Platform Separation v2 procedure declared COMPLETE." This is the terminal-state marker — no Phase 9 follows. The 15 open Stage 6.7.5 tickets in Project 10 become a standard post-operational backlog and are not in any further Stage 6 scope.

guide_verification.check: devplatform: git log --oneline shows unpause → history-update → pause as last 3 commits relevant to Phase 8
BlarAI: git log --oneline shows archive-move → STATUS.md E16 as last 2 commits on main
BlarAI: docs/platform_separation/ does NOT exist (git ls-files returns empty for that prefix)
BlarAI: docs/archive/platform_separation/STATUS.md exists; `git log --follow` shows pre-move history
BlarAI: docs/archive/platform_separation/temp_for_responses/ contains all 4 frozen verdict files (3.0.v2, 3.1.v2, 3.2.v2, 3.10)
BlarAI: docs/archive/platform_separation/STATUS.md contains E16 entry with closure declaration
devplatform: docs/PLATFORM_SEPARATION_HISTORY.md references docs/archive/platform_separation/STATUS.md (not the old path)
Vikunja: Phase 8 tracking task done=true (with completion comment)
Vikunja: backlog 45 total / 30 done / 15 open (the 15 deferred tickets all still open)
Unpause commit message contains "Stage 6 FINAL complete; Platform Separation v2 COMPLETE"
guide_verification.backlog_expectation: After Phase 7: 44 total / 29 done / 15 open Phase 8: +1 total (tracking task) / +1 done (tracking task) / 0 open change After Phase 8: 45 total / 30 done / 15 open
